subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! In this day moral refinement and goodly character are essential for every soul. Each one must be watchful over all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله از برای هر نفسی الیوم تهذیب و اخلاق لازم هر یک باید بکل ناظر باشند
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @generosity [kirama], @law of pilgrimage, @love and unity, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas
